chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-330 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.2574/ 2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on M.A No.2575/ 2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 22-12-2025. Mr. Moinuddin Akhter Qureshi advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. = Learned counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous application and intends to file Direct Complaint before competent Court of law. Order accordingly. JUDGE *Saleem*
